title: Search — pencarian kelas & materi per komunitas
description: Per-tenant full-text search (fase-2, STATUS #23) for belajar-with-rahmanef.com. MEMBER-ONLY: searchInTenant runs requireTenantRole(member) as its first line — anonymous and outsider callers are rejected before any domain read (P0, asserted in tests). Two bounded search-index reads: courses.search_title (eq tenantId + eq status published, take 10) and lessons.search_content (eq tenantId, take 15) with a DRAFT-GUARD pass that drops lessons whose owning course is not published — drafts never reach members (P0, asserted). Hits are safe projections {kind, title, courseSlug, lessonId?, snippet?}; snippet is contentMd stripped of markdown and cut at 120 chars — raw contentMd never ships. One mounted view: SearchView({ tenantId, tenantSlug, onNavigate? }) — onNavigate is the os-shell openApp seam (next/link fallback keeps the slice portable; no os-shell import).

os-shell: search window-app ← <SearchView tenantId={tenant._id} tenantSlug={tenant.slug} onNavigate={(href) => openApp(href)} />
